headline: How Pfizer’s Q1 Beat, Oncology Wins and Patent Deals At Pfizer (PFE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In early May 2026, Pfizer reported first-quarter revenue of US$14.45 billion and net income of US$2.69 billion, with earnings per share easing slightly year on year while the company reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue guidance of US$59.5 billion to US$62.5 billion and filed an US$8.42 billion employee share offering shelf registration. At the same time, Pfizer advanced its oncology franchise with positive Phase 3 data for multiple myeloma drug ELREXFIO and secured the first-ever FDA approval...
